creator: m7k60pkr@nanoman.ca
text:
In Mk/bsd.port.mk, when "config-conditional" targets "config", the "pre-config" target is called a second time unnecessarily.  This doesn't appear to be causing any problems, but it's a little inefficient.

Fix: I've attached a patch with the following changes:

 - rename "config" to "do-config"
 - remove "pre-config" from "do-config"
 - create a new "config" target that targets "pre-config" and then "do-config"
 - in "config-conditional", change "config" to "do-config"

Patch attached with submission follows:
